task_completion.description: Verify that past-due deals are correctly updated according to Rule 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the Potentials list view, deal detail/edit pages, or the final report showing 'BrightPath LMS Platform Build' and 'Catalyst LIMS Implementation' with Sales Stage 'Closed Lost', Probability '0', and the description containing '[Q1-AUDIT] Auto-closed - past due'.

task_completion.description: Verify that deals with critical tickets are correctly updated according to Rule 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing 'Atlas Supply Chain Analytics' and 'Pinnacle EHR Security Upgrade' with Sales Stage 'Needs Analysis', Probability '10', and the description containing '[Q1-AUDIT] Held - critical support escalation'.

task_completion.description: Verify that deals with major tickets are correctly updated according to Rule 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing 'GreenLeaf IoT Factory Monitoring' with Probability '20' and 'Sterling Trading Platform Modernization' with Probability '50'. Both should have the description containing '[Q1-AUDIT] Risk-adjusted - major support issue'.

task_completion.description: Verify that deals without qualifying tickets and with future close dates are left unmodified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing 'Apex Cloud Migration Phase 2', 'Horizon 5G Network Planning', 'Coastal Retail E-Commerce Replatform', and 'Ironclad Claims AI Platform' without any changes to their stage, probability, or description (no [Q1-AUDIT] tags).

task_completion.description: Verify that the required report was created in the Reports module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the Reports module showing a Tabular Report titled 'Q1 2026 Pipeline Reconciliation' created on the Potentials module.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacts with the actual Vtiger CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Vtiger CRM UI in a web browser at http://localhost:8000, clicking through modules like Potentials, HelpDesk, and Reports.

integrity.description: Verify the agent does not use terminal commands or scripts to update the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the agent using MySQL commands, Python scripts, or other terminal tools to modify the vtiger_potential or vtiger_crmentity tables.

integrity.description: Verify the report is created using the Vtiger Reports module UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent going through the report creation wizard in the Vtiger UI, rather than generating a standalone file or mocking the report page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Deals to be updated under Rule 1 (Past-due): 'BrightPath LMS Platform Build' and 'Catalyst LIMS Implementation' must be set to 'Closed Lost', 0% probability, with '[Q1-AUDIT] Auto-closed - past due' in description. Deals to be updated under Rule 2 (Critical tickets): 'Atlas Supply Chain Analytics' and 'Pinnacle EHR Security Upgrade' must be set to 'Needs Analysis', 10% probability, with '[Q1-AUDIT] Held - critical support escalation' in description. Deals to be updated under Rule 3 (Major tickets): 'GreenLeaf IoT Factory Monitoring' must be 20% probability, and 'Sterling Trading Platform Modernization' must be 50% probability, both with '[Q1-AUDIT] Risk-adjusted - major support issue' in description. Deals to remain unmodified: 'Apex Cloud Migration Phase 2', 'Horizon 5G Network Planning', 'Coastal Retail E-Commerce Replatform', 'Ironclad Claims AI Platform'. Final report must be a Tabular Report titled 'Q1 2026 Pipeline Reconciliation' on the Potentials module.
